# Daud Hidayat Ramadhan

> DevSecOps and Backend Engineer portfolio focused on Secure SDLC, CI/CD security, REST APIs, Kubernetes, security automation, and practical delivery workflows.

- Home: https://daudhr.com/
- Projects: https://daudhr.com/projects/

- DevSecOps
- Backend Engineering

- CI/CD Security
- REST API Security

- Container Scanning

## Entity

Daud Hidayat Ramadhan is a DevSecOps and Backend Engineer based in Indonesia. The portfolio documents secure backend systems, Secure SDLC practices, CI/CD security pipelines, Kubernetes labs, Linux security automation, and security-aware delivery workflows.

- GitHub: https://github.com/DaudHidayatR
